header: See Desiderio live — driven by a maintainer
description: A 30-minute walkthrough with one of the people who built it. We seed the full styleguide on a TYPO3 14 instance, click through all 10 element groups and the Visual Editor, and answer your migration and pricing questions on the spot.
reassurance: 30 minutes, no commitment — bring your hardest questions.

image.title: Desiderio new-content wizard
image.alternative: TYPO3 new content element wizard listing all 10 Desiderio element groups.
image.description: Screenshot of the TYPO3 backend with Desiderio installed.
